title: Unlocking Space - Security Awareness Resources
body: "The Unlocking Space for Government – Defence (USG - D) and Security & Resilience teams are delivering a learning programme to help demystify Security, Clearance and Classification for space industry stakeholders looking to work with the defence community.   Find out more about the USG-D team.    Find out more about Cyber Resilience in Space.   This is being delivered in the form of in-person and online sessions, delivered by UK Space Agency personnel. This page contains the key resources from the learning sessions. "
